title: Spanish Crispy Chili Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy dish that combines the crunch of crispy onions with the heat of chili peppers, all in a savory Spanish-inspired stir fry.
instructions: Heat stir fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add chili peppers and cook for 2 minutes, until tender.
Add onions and cook for 3 minutes, until crispy.
Add Spanish rice and stir to combine.
Sprinkle chili powder over the top and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
